name: apple-skills
description: Apple ecosystem skills for Claude Code and Codex, sourced from OpenAI's iOS and macOS plugin examples.

interface.shortDescription: OpenAI-sourced iOS and macOS skills for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Apple Skills packages OpenAI's Build iOS Apps and Build macOS Apps skill workflows for App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, iOS simulator debugging, ETTrace profiling, memgraph leak checks, macOS SwiftUI and AppKit work, SwiftPM, signing, notarization, logging, test triage, and window management.
defaultPrompt: Use Apple Skills to refine this SwiftUI feature.
Use Apple Skills to debug this iOS simulator issue.
Use Apple Skills to inspect this macOS app.
